csharpCode: public class Script { public static object Main() { var rewardObjs = UnityEngine.Object.FindObjectsOfType<UnityEngine.GameObject>(true); foreach(var obj in rewardObjs) { if(obj.name == "Reward" && obj.scene.name != null && obj.hideFlags == UnityEngine.HideFlags.None) { var toDestroy = new System.Collections.Generic.List<UnityEngine.Component>(); foreach(var mono in obj.GetComponentsInChildren<UnityEngine.MonoBehaviour>(true)) { if (mono == null) continue; string name = mono.GetType().Name; if (name == "RewardCardMenu" || name == "CardCollectionViewOpener" || name == "CardCollectionView") { toDestroy.Add(mono); } } foreach(var scroll in obj.GetComponentsInChildren<UnityEngine.UI.ScrollRect>(true)) { toDestroy.Add(scroll); } foreach(var mask in obj.GetComponentsInChildren<UnityEngine.UI.Mask>(true)) { toDestroy.Add(mask); } foreach(var comp in toDestroy) { UnityEngine.Object.DestroyImmediate(comp, true); } UnityEditor.SceneManagement.EditorSceneManager.MarkSceneDirty(obj.scene); return "Successfully cleaned up Reward UI on object: " + obj.name + ". Removed " + toDestroy.Count + " components."; } } return "Reward object not found in the scene."; } }
